author: abcoathup
content:
We are at the devnet stage. 

Current: glamsterdam-devnet-5
Speced: glamsterdam-devnet-6
Planned: glamsterdam-devnet-7

We may or may not need more devnets after that before upgrading public testnets. 

https://forkcast.org/upgrade/glamsterdam

author: yorickdowne
content: If you play with <https://forkcast.org/schedule>, then absolute earliest would be mid-September, assuming devnet-6 June 20th and devnet-7 14 days after that. Additional devnets or other events push it out. So, anywhere from mid-September to mid November seems likely.

author: .paulharris
content: Once the spec is stable and a devnet works we’ll have more confidence

author: tersec
content: Yes, all of this is why I glossed it as "not known yet". Almost anything is highly speculative
